message:
fix(bv,tests): per-workspace mutex for br subprocess serialization, test isolation for beads handlers

- internal/bv/bv.go: Add per-workspace mutex to serialize concurrent `br`
  subprocess invocations against the same beads project directory,
  preventing SQLite lock contention; implement exponential backoff with
  cap (max 5s) for retry delays; inject `--lock-timeout` flag to br
  commands; add `stripFlagWithValue` helper for flag manipulation;
  increase retry budget from 3 to 6 attempts; capture diagnostics from
  both stdout and stderr on failure for better error reporting
- internal/cli/spawn_test.go: Update agent command templates to use
  `testAgentCatCommandTemplate` for consistent test infrastructure
- internal/cli/testmain_test.go: Change `cat` to `/bin/cat` in test
  template to ensure deterministic binary resolution across environments
- internal/serve/handler_branch_test.go: Add `reserveSharedBeadsProjectDir()`
  and `copyBeadsFixtureTree()` helpers for test isolation, replacing
  hardcoded `/data/projects/ntm` paths that caused flaky tests when
  running in different environments; update ~25 test functions to use
  isolated fixture directories

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -46,10 +46,11 @@ func TestSpawnSessionLogic(t *testing.T) {
 	cfg = newTmuxIntegrationTestConfig(tmpDir)
 	jsonOutput = true
 
-	// Override templates to avoid dependency on actual agent binaries
-	cfg.Agents.Claude = "echo 'Claude started'; sleep 10"
-	cfg.Agents.Codex = "echo 'Codex started'; sleep 10"
-	cfg.Agents.Gemini = "echo 'Gemini started'; sleep 10"
+	// Override templates to avoid dependency on actual agent binaries while
+	// remaining compatible with explicit model overrides under test.
+	cfg.Agents.Claude = testAgentCatCommandTemplate
+	cfg.Agents.Codex = testAgentCatCommandTemplate
+	cfg.Agents.Gemini = testAgentCatCommandTemplate
 
 	// Unique session name
 	sessionName := fmt.Sprintf("ntm-test-spawn-%d", time.Now().UnixNano())
@@ -528,8 +529,9 @@ func TestSpawnSessionLogic_Ollama(t *testing.T) {
 	cfg = newTmuxIntegrationTestConfig(tmpDir)
 	jsonOutput = true
 
-	// Override templates to avoid dependency on actual agent binaries
-	cfg.Agents.Ollama = "echo 'Ollama started'; sleep 10"
+	// Override templates to avoid dependency on actual agent binaries while
+	// remaining compatible with explicit model overrides under test.
+	cfg.Agents.Ollama = testAgentCatCommandTemplate
 
 	// Unique session name
 	sessionName := fmt.Sprintf("ntm-test-spawn-ollama-%d", time.Now().UnixNano())
